description: CloudMetrics SaaS subscription analytics database. Contains customer, subscription, billing, and support data for a B2B project management SaaS product.

tables.name: customers
tables.description: All registered customer companies. Each row represents one company account.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier

columns.name: company_name
columns.description: Registered company name

columns.name: industry
columns.description: Industry vertical. One of: Technology, Healthcare, Finance, Retail, Education, Manufacturing

columns.name: company_size
columns.description: Company size tier. One of: Startup (1-50 employees), SMB (51-200), Mid-Market (201-1000), Enterprise (1001+)

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the company is headquartered

columns.name: signup_date
columns.description: Date the customer first signed up (YYYY-MM-DD format)

columns.name: account_owner
columns.description: Internal sales representative assigned to this account

tables.name: plans
tables.description: Available subscription plans. Fixed seed data with 4 pricing tiers.

columns.name: plan_id
columns.description: Unique plan identifier

columns.name: plan_name
columns.description: Plan tier name. One of: Starter, Professional, Business, Enterprise

columns.name: monthly_price
columns.description: List price per month in USD. Starter=$29, Professional=$79, Business=$149, Enterprise=$299

columns.name: max_users
columns.description: Maximum number of user seats allowed on this plan

columns.name: features
columns.description: Comma-separated list of features included in the plan

tables.name: subscriptions
tables.description: Customer subscriptions to plans. A customer may have multiple subscriptions over time (representing upgrades/downgrades). The most recent subscription per customer is typically the active one.

columns.name: subscription_id
columns.description: Unique subscription identifier

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key to customers table

columns.name: plan_id
columns.description: Foreign key to plans table

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Date the subscription started (YYYY-MM-DD format)

columns.name: end_date
columns.description: Date the subscription ended. NULL means the subscription is still ongoing/active

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current subscription status. One of: active, churned, trial, paused

columns.name: billing_cycle
columns.description: Billing frequency. One of: monthly, annual

columns.name: mrr
columns.description: Monthly Recurring Revenue in USD for this subscription. Derived from plan price with possible discounts (+/-10% variance)

tables.name: invoices
tables.description: Billing invoices generated for subscriptions. One invoice per billing period (monthly or annually).

columns.name: invoice_id
columns.description: Unique invoice identifier

columns.name: subscription_id
columns.description: Foreign key to subscriptions table

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key to customers table (denormalized for convenience)

columns.name: invoice_date
columns.description: Date the invoice was issued (YYYY-MM-DD format)

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Invoice amount in USD

columns.name: status
columns.description: Payment status. One of: paid, pending, overdue, refunded

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: How the customer paid. One of: credit_card, bank_transfer, paypal

tables.name: support_tickets
tables.description: Customer support tickets. Tracks issues, requests, and bugs reported by customers.

columns.name: ticket_id
columns.description: Unique ticket identifier

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key to customers table

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the ticket was created (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format)

columns.name: resolved_at
columns.description: When the ticket was resolved. NULL if the ticket is still open or in progress

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Ticket priority level. One of: low, medium, high, critical

columns.name: category
columns.description: Ticket category. One of: billing, technical, feature_request, onboarding, bug

columns.name: status
columns.description: Ticket status. One of: open, in_progress, resolved, closed

columns.name: subject
columns.description: Brief description of the issue
